title: WOPPLXY Acacia Wood Coaster Set of 8 with Holder, 10CM x 1.5CM Unfinished Round Wooden Coasters, Blank Coaster for Drinking, Coffee, Home, Decor
features: Premium Iron & Acacia Coasters - Set of 8: Hand-forged iron meets warm acacia wood for a rustic-luxury finish that doubles as décor. Each wood coasters measuring in 10 cm x 1.5 cm
No More Water Rings: The blank wooden coaster blocks condensation from wine glasses, coffee mugs or cold brew, protecting tables and worktops from stains, scratches and heat scorch
Universal Fit: Low-profile rim hugs tumblers, stemware, cans and teacups alike—perfect for everyday use or when you’re hosting friends
Quick Care: Our acacia wood coasters only need simply wipe with a damp cloth and towel-dry; occasional rub with food-safe oil keeps the grain rich and crack-free for years
Ideal Gift: Arrives in a full set, 8 wood coasters with a metal holder, ideal for house-warmings, weddings or anyone who loves stylish, practical home accessories
description: WOPPLXY Acacia Wood Coaster Set of 8 with Holder, 10CM x 1.5CM Unfinished Round Wooden Coasters, Blank Coaster for Drinking, Coffee, Home, Decor Our acacia wood coasters only need simply wipe with a damp cloth and towel-dry Hand-forged iron meets warm acacia wood for a rustic-luxury finish that doubles as décor Unfinished blank wooden coaster also suits for craft and DIY Christmas decor Specification: 8PCS x Acacia Wood Coasters Size:10CM x 10CM x 1.5CM Material: Acacia Wood
